query: at what sustained traffic level does ExpressRoute become cheaper than site-to-site VPN — assume 500 Mbps baseline

verdict.reason: A provides concrete cost table with verifiable per-GB rates and monthly estimates; B is defensible but less actionable with vaguer 30-50 Mbps range and no cost breakdown.

judge_metrics.content: {"A":{"technical_accuracy":7,"completeness":8,"actionability":8,"clarity":8,"conciseness":7},"B":{"technical_accuracy":7,"completeness":6,"actionability":6,"clarity":7,"conciseness":8},"winner":"A","reason":"A provides concrete cost table with verifiable per-GB rates and monthly estimates; B is defensible but less actionable with vaguer 30-50 Mbps range and no cost breakdown."}
